next_action: User runs acceptance test: convert DOCX file with merged-cell tables (e.g. IoT course syllabus) → verify all table content appears in markdown output.
recent_fixes: markdown_cleaner.py _clean_tables(): fallback now extends original table_lines instead of silently dropping
markdown_cleaner.py _table_to_structured_list(): sub-header heuristic — requires ALL non-empty cells to be bold (was 70%)
markdown_cleaner.py _count_empty_columns(): now checks all rows including header row
docling_service.py: added InputFormat.DOCX: WordFormatOption() with pipeline explanation comment
open_questions: Giữ nguyên 4 bước Stepper hay thay đổi số bước cho phù hợp thực tế?
Sau khi fix, nếu bảng DOCX vẫn xấu, giữ markdown gốc hay convert structured list với logic tốt hơn?
File DOCX/PDF test nào cần dùng ngoài đề cương IoT?
decisions: asar: false — Chromium renderer cannot load file:// from inside asar archives
TableFormerMode.ACCURATE — quality over speed for academic documents
WordFormatOption DOCX — SimplePipeline + MsWordDocumentBackend, no ML needed
Never drop content silently — markdown_cleaner fallbacks must preserve original
Simulated progress (Phase 6) before real SSE (Phase 7) — faster to ship
